chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Criminal Acquittal Appeal No.D-14 of 2018. _________________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE _________________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 22.02.2022 Mr. Ali Nawaz Ghanghro, Advocate for the appellant. None for the private respondents. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl.P.G for the State. = * = * = * = * = * = The appellant by way of instant criminal acquittal appeal has impugned judgment dated 15.03.2012, passed by learned 3rd Additional Sessions Judge, Shikarpur, whereby the private respondents were acquitted. The instant criminal acquittal appeal is second in series; the earlier one was dismissed by this Court on 03.09.2018, for non-prosecution. If for the sake of arguments, it is believed that the second criminal acquittal appeal could be maintained after dismissal of the first one for non-prosecution, then it appears to be time barred. Consequently, it is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
